title: Why Investing in Wind and Solar to Avoid Gas Shocks Hasn’t Added Up for Some
summary_full: Renewable energy is cheaper to run than fossil fuels, especially with war choking oil supply. But it hasn’t turned out that way for some European countries, and the reason is complex.
summary_public: Renewable energy is cheaper to run than fossil fuels, especially with war choking oil supply. But it hasn’t turned out that way for some European countries, and the reason is complex.
